app.name: Scope Guard
app.one_sentence_promise: Paste in client messages and get scope-creep flagged with a drafted change order before you do unpaid work.
app.target_user: Independent freelancers and small consultancies who lose money to informal scope creep buried in message threads.
app.painful_moment: A client casually asks for 'one more small thing' and the freelancer must decide, under time pressure, whether that's billable.
app.why_different: Intervenes before the unpaid work happens, at the moment the ask lands, instead of tracking time after the fact.
app.why_users_pay: Unlimited projects/clients and unlimited LLM extractions versus a capped free tier.
app.subscription_model: Free: 1 active project, 10 extractions/month. Paid (~$9.99/mo): unlimited projects and extractions, change-order templates, PDF export.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Local project/client records, pasted-text ingestion, on-device LLM extraction of deliverables vs. new asks, manual scope baseline, change-order draft generation, local export.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Repository protocol boundary now; later, optional email/Slack ingestion via cloud connector behind the same interface.
core_workflows: LLM flags in-scope vs out-of-scope asks
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: LLM extraction is the entire value proposition; ships an explicit non-LLM manual-tagging fallback for ineligible devices.
app.design_direction: Sharp, contract-grade, no-nonsense — legal document meets modern productivity app.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a premium iOS app called Scope Guard for freelancers to catch client scope creep. Sharp contract-grade aesthetic, clear in-scope/flagged distinction, paste-in-message screen, review/flag screen, change-order draft preview. Include empty state and an on-device-AI-unavailable fallback state.
app.app_store_positioning: Stop doing unpaid work you didn't agree to.
key_risks: Devices without Apple Intelligence eligibility need a genuinely usable manual fallback
Extraction quality needs validation against messy real-world phrasing
app.invalidation_criteria: If freelancers stop pasting messages after week one, or flags are routinely wrong, the mechanic needs rework.
app.v1_build_scope: Single-user local project/client management, manual scope baseline, paste-and-extract with LLM and manual fallback, change-order draft + export, full state coverage, StoreKit 2 paywall.
